overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a deserted urban street during an orange-hued sandstorm in a video game environment. The camera moves steadily past concrete apartment blocks and palm trees, encountering a single passing vehicle before approaching a pedestrian standing near a graffiti-covered building entrance.

events.description: dark sedan passes by on the right side of the street moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right side of the street next to a metal guardrail

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past the camera from behind to ahead on the right side

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete residential building with multiple balconies running along the left side
row of palm trees lining the center of the street visible through the haze
metal pipe railing running along the edge of the sidewalk
tall modern street lamp post with curved arm

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy orange-tinted urban street with a large concrete apartment block on the left and palm trees visible ahead through the dust. The camera walks steadily forward along a metal guardrail as a single sedan passes by on the right, the only vehicle in the otherwise deserted street.

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the street as the building wall gets closer on the left

entered.detail: scattered rubble and trash accumulated along the base of the building wall
concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to an apartment entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper along the street, the camera passes the guardrail and approaches the apartment building entrance. The concrete wall looms larger on the left with debris scattered at its base, while the palm trees grow closer in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered building entrance alcove with graffiti

events.description: moves from open street into the covered entrance area of the apartment building

agents.ego_description: approaching a person standing near the graffiti-covered entrance wall

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket standing still near the entrance looking at the graffiti wall

entered.detail: wall covered in spray paint graffiti including prominent 'HOLLYWOOD' text
external air conditioning units mounted on the building wall
doorway entrance to the apartment building

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered entrance alcove of the apartment building, where the lighting becomes darker and more enclosed. A person stands motionless near the wall which is covered in graffiti including 'HOLLYWOOD' lettering. External AC units are visible on the wall as the camera approaches the entrance stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a hazy, orange-tinted urban street that gradually closes in on a shadowed building entrance. It begins by walking steadily along a metal guardrail past a large concrete apartment block, as a single sedan passes through the dust-filled air. As the camera moves deeper into the deserted street, the concrete walls loom larger and the palm trees draw closer, with scattered debris appearing at the base of the structures. The scene then shifts from the open, glowing atmosphere into the darker, enclosed alcove of the apartment entrance. Finally, the camera approaches the entrance stairs, revealing external AC units and a motionless person standing against a wall covered in graffiti.
